# ARP request (space-separated bytes)
ff ff ff ff ff ff 00 11 22 33 44 55 08 06 00 01
08 00 06 04 00 01 00 11 22 33 44 55 c0 a8 00 01
00 00 00 00 00 00 c0 a8 00 02

# ICMP echo
00 11 22 33 44 55 aa bb cc dd ee ff 08 00 45 00
00 3c 00 01 00 00 40 01 00 00 7f 00 00 01 7f 00
00 01 08 00 00 00 00 01 00 01
